name: Tor Browser
description: An invisible shield for your browsing experience
compose:
name: slashnode-torbrowser
services:
  web:
    image: dennysubke/torbrowser:15.0.1
    container_name: torbrowser
    restart: unless-stopped
    networks:
      - slashnode
    environment:
      DARK_MODE: '1'
      WEB_AUDIO: '1'
    volumes:
      - web_config:/config
    ports:
      - 127.0.0.1:5832:5800
networks:
  slashnode:
    external: true
volumes:
  web_config:
    name: slashnode-torbrowser_web_config
